name: sanka-plugin
description: Sanka CRM plugin with MCP-powered contact, company, and expense management skills using native OAuth sign-in.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Sanka CRM and expenses with native OAuth
interface.longDescription: Use Sanka's hosted MCP endpoint and Sanka CRM skills to find contacts, companies, and manage expenses from Codex through the native browser-based OAuth flow. In Codex, start from the installed Sanka Plugin chip so the MCP server is attached to the thread. These queries and actions must come from the hosted MCP tools, not from any local Sanka repo, Django shell, or Postgres fallback.
defaultPrompt: Find a company in Sanka by name
List recent contacts that match a search term
List the most recent expenses in Sanka
Create an expense in Sanka from a receipt
